name: Dom Scenarios

5. Assertive master - Pet training and Punishments/ being Owned territory
6. Strict - Forces obedience and servitude

8. Ruthless - Treats you like an object with a purpose
9. Possessive Tyrant - Expects worship, punishment is intense
10. Godlike master - You are furniture, toy, property. Full ownership. Used and discarded at will
